functions.name: anonymize_user_struct
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.anonymize_user_struct(_user_struct_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _email varchar;
BEGIN

    SELECT INTO _email _user_struct_id || '@mail.example';

    perform customers.user_create_if_not_exists(_email);

    -- update email, first_name, last_name, phone
    UPDATE customers.user_struct SET
        primary_email = NULL,
        first_name = 'deleted_user_' || _user_struct_id,
        last_name = '',
        phone = LPAD('0' || _user_struct_id, 10, '0'),
        marketing_on_primary_email = false,
        maintenance_on_primary_email = false,
        role_id = NULL,
        state_id = 4, -- DELETED state
        updated = NOW()
    WHERE id = _user_struct_id;

    -- delete preferences
    DELETE FROM customers.preference WHERE user_struct_id = _user_struct_id;

    -- delete contacts
    DELETE FROM customers.contact WHERE user_struct_id = _user_struct_id;
end;
$function$

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.auto_add_pages_to_role()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- add to role all the
    INSERT INTO customers.role_page (role_id, page_name)
    SELECT
        NEW.id,
        name
    FROM customers.page
    WHERE auto_add IS true
    ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

functions.name: biometric_request_new_ext
biometric_request_new_sudo
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.biometric_request_new_sudo(json_data json, _caller_customer_id bigint)
 RETURNS bigint
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
_request_id bigint;
BEGIN
    -- check user_struct exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM customers.user_struct
        WHERE id = (json_data->>'user_struct_id')::bigint
          AND customer_id = _caller_customer_id
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'No user_struct with id % found for customer %',
            (json_data->>'user_struct_id')::bigint,
            _caller_customer_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T5AZ0';
    END IF;

    -- insert into biometric_request
    INSERT INTO customers.biometric_request (
        user_struct_id,
        admin_user_struct_id,
        request_type,
        request_source,
        customer_id
    ) VALUES (
                 (json_data->>'user_struct_id')::bigint,
                 NULL,  -- no admin
                 (json_data->>'request_type')::request_type_enum,
                 'internal'::request_source_enum,
                 _caller_customer_id
             )
    RETURNING id INTO _request_id;

RETURN _request_id;
END;
$function$

functions.name: biometric_request_set_completed
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.biometric_request_set_completed(_request_id bigint, _completed boolean)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check request exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customers.biometric_request WHERE id = _request_id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'No biometric_request with id % found', _request_id USING ERRCODE = 'T5AZ1';
    END IF;

    -- update request_completed and set timestamp
    UPDATE customers.biometric_request
    SET
        request_completed = _completed,
        request_approval_date = now()
    WHERE id = _request_id;

END;
$function$

functions.name: biometric_request_set_notified_dc
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.biometric_request_set_notified_dc(_biometric_request_id bigint, _notified boolean)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check if biometric request exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customers.biometric_request WHERE id = _biometric_request_id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'No biometric_request with id % found', _biometric_request_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T8AZ0';
    END IF;

    -- update notified_dc flag
    UPDATE customers.biometric_request
    SET notified_dc = _notified
    WHERE id = _biometric_request_id;

END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.get_customer_groups()
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$

    select json_agg(x) from (select id, name, is_default, is_partner from customers.customer_group order by id)  x;

functions.name: get_is_biometric
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.get_is_biometric(_user_struct_id bigint)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
_is_biometric bool;
_ued_is_biometric bool;
_latest_request_type text;
_latest_request_completed bool;
BEGIN
    -- get user_entrance_detail flag
    SELECT ued.is_biometric
    INTO _ued_is_biometric
    FROM user_struct us
             JOIN "user" u ON u.email = us.primary_email
             LEFT JOIN user_entrance_detail ued ON ued.email = u.email
    WHERE us.id = _user_struct_id
            LIMIT 1;

    -- latest biometric request type and whether it is completed
    SELECT br.request_type, br.request_completed
    INTO _latest_request_type, _latest_request_completed
    FROM biometric_request br
    WHERE br.user_struct_id = _user_struct_id
    ORDER BY br.request_date DESC
        LIMIT 1;

    -- _is_biometric determination
    -- true:
    --    (_ued_is_biometric AND ((last_request_type = 'activation' AND last_request_completed = TRUE)
    --    OR (last_request_type = 'deactivation' AND last_request_completed = FALSE)))  -- pending deactivation
    -- false:
    --    (!_ued_is_biometric OR (last_request_type = 'deactivation' AND last_request_completed = TRUE)
    --     OR (last_request_type = 'activation' AND last_request_completed = FALSE))  -- pending activation

    IF _latest_request_type IS NULL THEN
            _is_biometric := FALSE;

    ELSIF ( _ued_is_biometric = TRUE
            AND ( (_latest_request_type = 'activation' AND _latest_request_completed = TRUE)
            OR (_latest_request_type = 'deactivation' AND _latest_request_completed = FALSE) ) ) THEN
                _is_biometric := TRUE;

    ELSIF ( _ued_is_biometric = FALSE
            OR (_latest_request_type = 'deactivation' AND _latest_request_completed = TRUE)
            OR (_latest_request_type = 'activation' AND _latest_request_completed = FALSE) ) THEN
                _is_biometric := FALSE;

    ELSE
        -- last fallback, should never happen anyway
        _is_biometric := FALSE;

    END IF;

    RETURN _is_biometric;
END;
$function$

functions.name: get_latest_biometric_request
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.get_latest_biometric_request(_user_struct_id bigint)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
result jsonb;
BEGIN
SELECT jsonb_build_object(
               'request_type', br.request_type,
               'request_completed', br.request_completed,
               'request_source', br.request_source
       )
INTO result
FROM biometric_request br
WHERE br.user_struct_id = _user_struct_id
ORDER BY br.request_date DESC
    LIMIT 1;

IF result IS NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'No biometric request found for user_struct_id %', _user_struct_id
            USING ERRCODE = 'T8AZ0';
END IF;

RETURN result;
END;
$function$

functions.name: is_user_active
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.is_user_active(_user_struct_id bigint)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN EXISTS(
        SELECT *
        FROM customers.user_struct u
            INNER JOIN customers.user_state us ON u.state_id = us.id
            INNER JOIN customers.customer c ON u.customer_id = c.id
            INNER JOIN customers.customer_state cs ON c.state_id = cs.id
        WHERE u.id = _user_struct_id AND us.enabled =true AND cs.enabled
    );
END;
$function$

functions.name: is_user_deleted
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.is_user_deleted(_user_struct_id bigint)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM customers.user_struct WHERE id = _user_struct_id AND state_id <> 4);
END;
$function$

functions.name: maintenance_email_get_by_customer_id
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.maintenance_email_get_by_customer_id(_customer_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM customers.customer WHERE id = _customer_id)THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Invalid customer_id: %', _customer_id USING ERRCODE = 'T1BZ3';
    end if;

    RETURN json_agg(x) FROM (SELECT maintenance_email.email , maintenance_email.first_name, maintenance_email.last_name, c.name as customer_name, maintenance_email.language
FROM (
    SELECT u.email, us.first_name, us.last_name, us.customer_id, COALESCE(us.language, 'it') AS language
    FROM customers."user" u
        INNER JOIN customers.user_struct us on us.primary_email = u.email
    WHERE maintenance_on_primary_email = true
    UNION
    SELECT c.value as email, us.first_name, us.last_name, us.customer_id, COALESCE(us.language, 'it') AS language
    FROM customers.contact c
       INNER JOIN customers.user_struct us on c.user_struct_id = us.id
    WHERE c.type_id = (SELECT id FROM contact_type WHERE name = 'secondary_email') AND maintenance_notification = true
) as maintenance_email

    LEFT JOIN customers.customer c ON maintenance_email.customer_id = c.id
WHERE maintenance_email.customer_id = _customer_id) as x;

END;
$function$

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.page_get_by_role_id_table_ext(_role_id bigint, _customer_group_id bigint)
 RETURNS SETOF customers.page
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check if role exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM customers.role WHERE id = _role_id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION '[page_get_by_role_id_table_ext] No role with id %d found', _role_id USING ERRCODE = 'T3AZ0';
    end if;

    RETURN QUERY (
        SELECT p.*
        FROM customers.role r
                 LEFT JOIN customers.role_page rp on r.id = rp.role_id
                 LEFT JOIN customers.page p on rp.page_name = p.name
                 LEFT JOIN customers.page_customer_group pcg ON p.name = pcg.page_name
        WHERE r.id = _role_id AND p.only_selectable_by_cdlan = false AND pcg.customer_group_id = _customer_group_id
        ORDER BY p.name
    );
END;
$function$

functions.name: page_get_by_role_id_table_sudo
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.page_get_by_role_id_table_sudo(_role_id bigint)
 RETURNS SETOF customers.page
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check if role exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM customers.role WHERE id = _role_id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION '[page_get_by_role_id_table_sudo] No role with id %d found', _role_id USING ERRCODE = 'T3AZ0';
    end if;

    RETURN QUERY (
        SELECT p.*
        FROM customers.role r
                 LEFT JOIN customers.role_page rp on r.id = rp.role_id
                 LEFT JOIN customers.page p on rp.page_name = p.name
        WHERE r.id = _role_id
        ORDER BY p.name
    );
END;
$function$

functions.name: page_get_by_user_struct_id_ext
page_get_by_user_struct_id_sudo
page_get_by_user_struct_id_table_ext
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.page_get_by_user_struct_id_table_ext(user_struct_id bigint, _customer_group_id bigint)
 RETURNS SETOF customers.page
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check if user_struct exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM customers.user_struct WHERE id = user_struct_id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION '[page_get_by_user_struct_id_table_ext] No user_struct with id %d found', user_struct_id USING ERRCODE = 'T5AZ0';
    end if;

    RETURN QUERY (
        SELECT p.*
        FROM customers.user_struct us
                 INNER JOIN customers.role r on us.role_id = r.id
                 INNER JOIN customers.role_page rp on r.id = rp.role_id
                 INNER JOIN customers.page p on rp.page_name = p.name
                 INNER JOIN customers.page_customer_group pcg ON p.name = pcg.page_name
                 INNER JOIN customers.user_state uss ON us.state_id = uss.id
                 INNER JOIN customers.customer c ON us.customer_id = c.id
                 INNER JOIN customers.customer_state cs ON c.state_id = cs.id
        WHERE us.id = user_struct_id
          AND uss.enabled = true
          AND cs.enabled = true
          AND p.only_selectable_by_cdlan = false
          AND pcg.customer_group_id = _customer_group_id
        ORDER BY p.name
    );
END;
$function$

functions.name: page_get_by_user_struct_id_table_sudo
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.page_get_by_user_struct_id_table_sudo(user_struct_id bigint)
 RETURNS SETOF customers.page
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check if user_struct exists
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM customers.user_struct WHERE id = user_struct_id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION '[page_get_by_user_struct_id_table_sudo] No user_struct with id %d found', user_struct_id USING ERRCODE = 'T5AZ0';
    end if;

    RETURN QUERY (
        SELECT p.*
        FROM customers.user_struct us
                 LEFT JOIN customers.role r on us.role_id = r.id
                 LEFT JOIN customers.role_page rp on r.id = rp.role_id
                 LEFT JOIN customers.page p on rp.page_name = p.name
                LEFT JOIN customers.user_state uss ON us.state_id = uss.id
        WHERE us.id = user_struct_id
          AND uss.enabled = true
        ORDER BY p.name
    );
END;
$function$

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.preference_upsert(json_data json, _user_struct_id bigint)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- check preference exists for user
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM preference WHERE user_struct_id = _user_struct_id) THEN

        -- if not exists -> create
        PERFORM preference_new(json_data, _user_struct_id);
    ELSE

        -- else update it
        PERFORM preference_update(json_data, _user_struct_id);
    end if;

END;
$function$

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.role_get_all_by_customer_id_ext(_customer_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    roles json[];
BEGIN

    -- get all roles
    SELECT array(
                   SELECT customers.role_build_json_ext(id, _customer_id, false)
                   FROM customers.role
                   WHERE customer_id = _customer_id
           ORDER BY name
           ) into roles;

    -- delete page
    RETURN to_json(roles);
END;
$function$

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.role_get_all_by_customer_id_sudo(_customer_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    roles json[];
BEGIN

    -- get all roles
    SELECT array(
        SELECT customers.role_build_json_sudo(id)
        FROM customers.role
        WHERE customer_id = _customer_id
           ORDER BY name
    ) into roles;

    -- delete page
    RETURN to_json(roles);
END;
$function$

functions.name: role_get_all_ext
role_get_all_sudo
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.role_get_all_sudo(_search_struct json)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    roles json[];
BEGIN

    -- get all roles
    SELECT array(
        SELECT customers.role_build_json_sudo(id)
        FROM customers.role
        WHERE (_search_struct->>'customer_id' IS NULL OR customer_id IS NULL OR customer_id = (_search_struct->>'customer_id')::bigint)
          AND name LIKE concat('%', _search_struct->>'search_string', '%')
           ORDER BY name
    ) into roles;

    -- return
    RETURN to_json(roles);
END;
$function$

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.update_biometric_user_struct()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    UPDATE customers.biometric_request
    SET user_struct_id = NEW.id
    WHERE user_struct_id = OLD.id;

    UPDATE customers.biometric_request
    SET admin_user_struct_id = NEW.id
    WHERE admin_user_struct_id = OLD.id;

    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.user_create_if_not_exists(_email character varying)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- create if not exist
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM customers."user" WHERE email = _email) THEN

        INSERT INTO customers."user" (email) VALUES (_email);
    end if;
END;
$function$

 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    -- STATE 3 is disabled from cdlan
    UPDATE customers.user_struct SET state_id = 3 WHERE customer_id = _customer_id;
END;

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.user_struct_get_all_by_customer_id_ext(_customer_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _user_structs json[];
BEGIN

    -- get all user_structs
    SELECT ARRAY (
        SELECT customers.user_struct_build_json_ext(id, _customer_id)
        FROM customers.user_struct_view_ext(_customer_id)
        ORDER BY last_name
    ) INTO _user_structs;

    -- return
    RETURN to_json(_user_structs);

END;
$function$

BEGIN

    -- get all user_structs
    SELECT ARRAY (
        SELECT customers.user_struct_build_json_sudo(id)
        FROM customers.user_struct_view_cdlan()
        WHERE customer_id = _customer_id
        ORDER BY last_name
    ) INTO _user_structs;

    -- return
    RETURN to_json(_user_structs);

END;

functions.name: user_struct_get_all_by_role_id_ext
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.user_struct_get_all_by_role_id_ext(_role_id bigint, _caller_customer_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _user_structs json[];
BEGIN

    -- get all user_structs
    SELECT ARRAY (
        SELECT customers.user_struct_build_json_ext(us.id, _caller_customer_id)
        FROM customers.user_struct_view_ext(_caller_customer_id) us
            LEFT JOIN customers.role r ON us.role_id = r.id
        WHERE role_id = _role_id AND us.customer_id = _caller_customer_id
        ORDER BY us.last_name
    ) INTO _user_structs;

    -- return
    RETURN to_json(_user_structs);

END;
$function$

functions.name: user_struct_get_all_by_role_id_sudo
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.user_struct_get_all_by_role_id_sudo(_role_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    _user_structs json[];
BEGIN

    -- get all user_structs
    SELECT ARRAY (
        SELECT customers.user_struct_build_json_sudo(id)
        FROM customers.user_struct_view_cdlan()
        WHERE role_id = _role_id
        ORDER BY last_name
    ) INTO _user_structs;

    -- return
    RETURN to_json(_user_structs);

END;
$function$

functions.name: user_struct_get_all_ext
user_struct_get_all_sudo
user_struct_get_current
user_struct_get_ext
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.user_struct_get_ext(_user_struct_id bigint, _caller_customer_id bigint)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN

    RETURN customers.user_struct_build_json_ext(_user_struct_id, _caller_customer_id);

END;
$function$

functions.name: user_struct_get_sudo
user_struct_hard_delete_sudo
user_struct_new_ext
user_struct_new_sudo
user_struct_set_current
user_struct_update_ext
user_struct_update_sudo
user_struct_view_cdlan
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.user_struct_view_cdlan()
 RETURNS SETOF customers.user_struct
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY SELECT u.* FROM customers.user_struct u INNER JOIN customers.user_state s ON u.state_id = s.id WHERE s.visible_cdlan = true;

END;
$function$

functions.name: user_struct_view_ext
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.user_struct_view_ext(_customer_id bigint)
 RETURNS SETOF customers.user_struct
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY SELECT u.* FROM customers.user_struct u INNER JOIN customers.user_state s ON u.state_id = s.id WHERE s.visible_ext = true AND u.customer_id = _customer_id;
END;
$function$

functions.name: variable_add_to_customer
variable_add_to_customer_group
variable_delete
variable_get_all
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION customers.variable_get_all()
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN coalesce((SELECT json_agg(x) FROM (SELECT * FROM customers.variable)x), '[]'::json);
END;
$function$
